html:
Exclusive to:

“A refined piece of a Portation Orb. It can be socketed at the Telelocator Focus, and used to teleport to one by focusing.”

-

The Portation Orb Fragment is an item that can be crafted with a Portation Orb at the Sanctum Smithy.

The Portation Orb Fragment can be socketed at the Telelocator Focus. When player use a Telelocator Staff to teleport to a Telelocator Focus with Portation Orb Fragment socketed, it will not consume the Portation Orb Fragments on it.

Player can also right-click the Portation Orb Fragment to "Portate"(teleport) to any Telelocator Focus that has 3 Portation Orb Fragments socketed. They can teleport on the Surface or in the Caves, but cannot across two Shards. Doing so will not cost sanity drain but will consume a Portation Orb Fragment.

Trivia

  • On beta it was called "Polished Orb Fragment".
  • On beta it used 1 Orb Fragment for crafting.
  • The Portation Orb Fragment were introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

Gallery

  • Telelocator Focus with Portation Orb Fragment socketed.
  • Map indicator when doing Portate Action.


DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
“It really moves me.”
–Wilson
“So pretty. Now what do I do with it?”
–Willow
“So pretty and shiny.”
–Wolfgang
“It won't take me to the one place I want to go.”
–Wendy
“TELEPORTATION COMPONENT”
–WX-78
“The ancients tapped the orbs power for teleportation.”
–Wickerbottom
“It sure cleans up nicely.”
–Woodie
“Those crafty old bugs...”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a pötent örb öf öld.”
–Wigfrid
“Ooh we know a fun game with this.”
–Webber
“Voila! Beautiful!”
–Warly
“Shiny friend!”
–Wormwood
“I've seen something like this before.”
–Winona
“For imitation of my teleportation.”
–Wortox
“Prettiest rock! Glorp!”
–Wurt
“Pinetree Pioneers don't normally take shortcuts, but this might come in handy.”
–Walter
“I remember these... shortcuts.”
–Wanda
“A refined piece of a Portation Orb. It can be socketed at the Telelocator Focus, and used to teleport to one by focusing.”

Player can also right-click the Portation Orb Fragment to "Portate"(teleport) to any Telelocator Focus that has 3 Portation Orb Fragments socketed. Mảnh vỡ Quả cầu Portation là một vật phẩm có thể được chế tạo bằng Quả cầu Portation tại Lò rèn Sanctum.

{{Scrapbook Info|A refined piece of a Portation Orb. It can be socketed at the Telelocator Focus, and used to teleport to one by focusing.}}
The '''Portation Orb Fragment''' is an item that can be crafted with a [[Portation Orb]] at the [[Sanctum Smithy]].

The Portation Orb Fragment can be socketed at the [[Telelocator Focus/DST|Telelocator Focus]]. When player use a [[Telelocator Staff/DST|Telelocator Staff]] to teleport to a Telelocator Focus with Portation Orb Fragment socketed, it will not consume the Portation Orb Fragments on it.

Player can also right-click the Portation Orb Fragment to "Portate"(teleport) to any Telelocator Focus that has 3 Portation Orb Fragments socketed. They can teleport on the Surface or in the Caves, but cannot across two [[Shard]]s. Doing so will not cost sanity drain but will consume a Portation Orb Fragment.

==[[File:Placeholder.png|32px|link=]] Trivia==
* On beta it was called "Polished Orb Fragment".
* On beta it used 1 [[Orb Fragment]] for crafting.
* The Portation Orb Fragment were introduced in the [[Cursed Confrontation Part 1]] update.

<gallery>
File:Portation Socketed Telelocator Focus Map Icon.png|Telelocator Focus with Portation Orb Fragment socketed.

</gallery>
